Meal3: "Midday Boost" 700: Beef mince 150g (300) + sweet potato 250g (215) + black beans 100g (130) + salsa 55 (55). Total 700.

Meal4: "Afternoon Refuel" 600: Greek yogurt lactaid free 200g (150) + granola nut-free 50g (200) + berries 150g (100) + honey 50g (150). Total 600.

Meal5: "Evening Muscle Feast" 662: Salmon 180g (360) + brown rice 180g (250) + steamed broccoli 150g (52). Total 662.

Now sum 600+800+700+600+662=3362 good.

Macros approximate: protein maybe 150g, carbs 350g, fats 90g? Provide as string.
